title: dryopteris fragilis
intro: Dryopteris fragilis, also known as the fragile fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The health benefits of Dryopteris fragilis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to prevent cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
